new_york.name: Candle 79
new_york.note: NYC's most celebrated vegan fine dining. Warm, elegant atmosphere.

new_york.name: Halal Guys
new_york.note: Classic NYC street food institution, now with a dine-in location.

new_york.name: by CHLOE. Midtown
new_york.note: Popular vegan fast-casual. Great for quick, filling plant-based meals.

new_york.name: Cafe Boulud
new_york.note: Award-winning French restaurant with seasonal vegetarian tasting menu.

new_york.name: Jollibee Times Square
new_york.note: Iconic Filipino fast food chain. Halal chicken options available.

washington_dc.name: Fare Well
washington_dc.note: DC's celebrated vegan comfort food restaurant. Try the brunch on weekends.

washington_dc.name: Founding Farmers
washington_dc.note: Westin Serve360 partner. Strong local sourcing. Great brunch.

washington_dc.name: Compass Rose
washington_dc.note: Global street food from 20+ countries. Multiple dietary options clearly labeled.

miami.name: Planta South Beach
miami.note: 100% plant-based restaurant. Best vegan sushi in Miami.

miami.name: Choices Cafe
miami.note: Beloved local vegan cafe. Raw and cooked options, organic ingredients.

chicago.name: Chicago Diner — Wrigleyville
chicago.note: Chicago's original meat-free diner since 1983. Legendary milkshakes.

chicago.name: Ras Dashen Ethiopian
chicago.note: Authentic Ethiopian. Excellent injera and vegan combo platter.
